findings.title: Parser reports non-worker commands as workers
findings.impact: Any process whose command line contains -worker_address= is appended to the status result, including a concurrent dscli stop command or other tooling. This makes dscli status return false worker rows and breaks the documented discovery contract; the added test_skips_dscli_process would fail because the dscli line is included.
findings.fix: Apply the existing _WORKER_BIN_RE filter to cmdline before extracting/appending the address, e.g. skip the line unless _WORKER_BIN_RE.search(cmdline) is true.
